steps.text: Rain hammers the village gates. A figure with a travel pack walks toward the dark. Naruto blocks the path.

steps.speaker: Naruto
steps.text: Where are you going?! You can't just leave! We're a team — we're brothers!

steps.speaker: Sasuke
steps.text: "Brothers"? Don't make me laugh. This village has nothing left to give me. I'm taking the power Orochimaru offered.

steps.speaker: Sasuke
steps.text: ...Thank you. For everything. But my path is vengeance now.

steps.speaker: Naruto
steps.text: Then I'll bring you back! I'll hunt you down, beat you, and drag you home if I have to. That's my ninja way!

steps.speaker: Sasuke
steps.text: Then try, Naruto. But next time we meet... I won't be holding back.
Sasuke vanishes into the rain. He has left your squad.
